mapper.sql: id, inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, invite_code, reward_status, reward_granted_at, trigger_biz_no, skip_reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation WHERE invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO invite_relation (inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, invite_code, reward_status) VALUES (#{inviterUserId}, #{inviteeUserId}, #{inviteCode}, 'PENDING')
mapper.update: UPDATE invite_relation SET reward_status = 'GRANTED', reward_granted_at = NOW(), trigger_biz_no = #{triggerBizNo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation WHERE inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} AND reward_status = 'GRANTED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation WHERE inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} AND reward_status = 'GRANTED' AND DATE(reward_granted_at) = CURDATE() AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT ir.invitee_user_id AS userId, u.username, ir.created_at AS invitedAt FROM invite_relation ir LEFT JOIN blog_user u ON ir.invitee_user_id = u.id WHERE ir.inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} AND ir.reward_status = 'GRANTED' AND ir.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ir.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation ir
LEFT JOIN blog_user inviter ON ir.inviter_user_id = inviter.id AND inviter.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN blog_user invitee ON ir.invitee_user_id = invitee.id AND invitee.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE ir.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ir.reward_status = #{rewardStatus}
AND ( inviter.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR invitee.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ir.invite_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
